item.title: 📝 cosZone/MoePeek (427 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: cosZone

📝 Repository: cosZone/MoePeek

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight macOS selection translator built with pure Swift 6, featuring on-device Apple Translate for privacy, only 5MB install size and stable ~50MB memory usage. 一款轻量级 macOS 划词翻译工具，纯 Swift 6 开发，设备端 Apple 翻译保护隐私，安装体积仅 5MB，后台运行内存稳定约 50MB

⭐ Stelle: 427

🍴 Forks: 25

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: apple macos ocr short swift

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T12:29:00Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-16T08:03:45Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

item.title: 📝 ivan-magda/swift-claude-code (133 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: ivan-magda

📝 Repository: ivan-magda/swift-claude-code

📄 Descrizione: A Swift reimplementation of a Claude Code-style coding agent, built stage by stage to explore what makes coding agents work

⭐ Stelle: 133

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Swift

🏷️ Topics: agentic-ai ai-agent anthropic claude-code cli coding-agent developer-tools swift swift-concurrency swift-package-manager

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-27T08:45:35Z

item.description:
👤 Owner: franklioxygen

📝 Repository: franklioxygen/v2s

item.title: 📝 Jstrom2022/tvbox-Swift (99 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Jstrom2022

📝 Repository: Jstrom2022/tvbox-Swift

📄 Descrizione: TVBox-Swift 是一套基于原生 Swift & SwiftUI 构建的跨平台多媒体应用核心工程。它同时支持 macOS 和 iOS 设备，致力于在双端提供无缝、现代且极其流畅的视听体验。

⭐ Stelle: 99

🍴 Forks: 16

📜 Licenza: MIT License
